Resolve a single secret value

Source: R/secrets.R
resolveSecretValue.Rd

If the value is a plain string (no !expr prefix), return it as-is. If it starts with !expr , strip the prefix and evaluate the remaining R expression using rlang::eval_tidy(). This supports any valid R expression: keyring::key_get(...), Sys.getenv(...), custom functions, etc.

Usage

resolveSecretValue(value)

Arguments

value

A single value from a parsed secrets YAML file.

Value

The resolved value (plain string or evaluated expression result).

On this page
